g.text: re-frame's six dominoes — the closed unidirectional loop
state only changes by dispatching events
① EVENT — a reified Command (data, not a call)
a vector of effects. No IO happens here —
that is what makes replay/time-travel possible.
④b Effects handed to fx handlers
Only subs whose inputs changed re-run.
Some effects dispatch a NEW event when their
reagent view — the f in the loop equation above
Data flows ONE way: event → handler → effect → state → sub → view → (event).
